sentence_reviews.text: Neural learning is constrained or augmented by logic, programs, equations, or known physical structure.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Sen et al. 2021 abstract: neuro-symbolic ILP and logical neural networks; Li et al. 2021 PINO abstract: data plus physics/PDE constraints; AIMA contents: logic, knowledge representation, learning.
sentence_reviews.notes: The claim combines neuro-symbolic and physics-informed strands; each component is directly supported by inspected sources.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning is to connect Supervised learning, Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas to downstream capabilities including Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs, Neuro-symbolic models.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PINO abstract: FNO/PINN/PDE constraints and training data; Sen et al. abstract: neuro-symbolic ILP/logical neural networks; AIMA contents: supervised learning and knowledge representation.
sentence_reviews.notes: The downstream links are supported across sources, but knowledge graphs/ontologies are broader than the directly inspected logical-representation evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Li et al. 2021 abstract: physics-informed neural operators combine training data and PDE constraints; uses Fourier neural operator framework and compares with PINNs.
Sen et al. 2021 abstract: neuro-symbolic inductive logic programming with logical neural networks and first-order logic rules.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for the neuro-symbolic half of the node.

sentence_reviews.text: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents: supervised learning and knowledge representation; PINO abstract discusses training data and PDE constraints, not this generic limitation.
sentence_reviews.notes: The generic limitation and exact dependency list are not directly supported by inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PINO abstract: combines training data and physics constraints; AIMA contents: supervised learning chapter.
sentence_reviews.notes: Some methods use supervised data, but physics-only constraints and unsupervised/logical settings also exist; 'follows' overstates commonality.

sentence_reviews.text: Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning uses Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents: Knowledge Representation and First-Order Logic; Sen et al. 2021 abstract: first-order logic rules.
sentence_reviews.notes: Symbolic logic is supported, but knowledge graphs/ontologies/schemas are narrower/different artifacts not directly inspected.

sentence_reviews.text: Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning uses Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents: Notes on Languages and Algorithms appendix; no inspected source directly ties programs/AST/IR to this node.
sentence_reviews.notes: Programs can be part of neuro-symbolic systems, but AST/bytecode/IR is too specific for the inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning uses Differential equations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Li et al. 2021 abstract: physics-informed neural operators learn PDE solution operators and impose PDE constraints.

sentence_reviews.text: Neuro-symbolic & physics-informed learning uses Multimodal, simulated & streaming data as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PINO abstract: training data and PDE constraints for parametric PDE families; no multimodal or streaming claim inspected.
sentence_reviews.notes: Simulation/scientific data is plausible, but multimodal/streaming is not supported by inspected evidence.

edge_reviews.notes: Training data supports a common supervised setup for some methods, but the relationship type 'trained_under' is too narrow for physics-only and logic-constrained methods.
Symbolic knowledge/logic is supported; knowledge graphs specifically are not directly shown.
Programmatic symbolic representations are plausible, but core strength for AST/IR is not supported by inspected evidence.
PDE constraints and solution operators directly support a core uses edge for the physics-informed part of the node.
The inspected evidence does not establish multimodal, simulated, or streaming data as a common reusable ingredient.
